children.label: a
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subchapter, the Secretary shall administer the recreation area in accordance with the provisions of the Act of (; , 2–4), as amended and supplemented.August 25, 191639 Stat. 53516 U.S.C. 11See References in Text note below.1

children.label: b
children.text: Nothing contained in this subchapter shall affect or interfere with the authority of the Secretary by the Act of () [ et seq.], to operate the Arbuckle Dam and Reservoir in accordance with and for the purposes set forth in that Act.August 24, 196276 Stat. 39543 U.S.C. 616k
